nasb.text: You shall do according to the terms of the verdict which they declare to you from that place which the Lord chooses; and you shall be careful to observe according to all that they teach you.

esv.text: Then you shall do according to what they declare to you from that place that the Lord will choose. And you shall be careful to do according to all that they direct you.

cnv.text: 你要照著他們從耶和華選擇的那地方，向你指示的話去行；他們指教你的，你都要謹守遵行。

ccb.text: 你们必须执行他们在耶和华所选择的地方宣告的判决，你们要谨慎遵行他们的一切指示。
